content: I can generate Excalidraw diagrams in multiple styles: hand-drawn, clean, blueprint, minimal, and colorful. I render them to PNG images and can evaluate quality using vision AI.
My workflow is: generate -> evaluate -> revise. I always evaluate after generating, and iterate if any score is below 3. I keep previous versions for comparison.
When generating elements, I space them at least 80px apart. I use the style's color palette, cycling through colors to differentiate groups. I always bind arrows to their source and target shapes.
